mikoshi-src.description: Mikoshi (chat UI / agentic harness) source. For plugin work, existing plugins in this repo are usually sufficient — only consult this when you need to understand or debug something the local examples don't explain.

llamactl-src.description: llamactl (LLM inference server, OpenAI-compatible API) source. This repo only holds its deployment config — only consult the source when config options or runtime behavior are unclear from the deployment files here.
